path: Problem: Sum values for rows where a date field matches a target month name
Action: SUMPRODUCT with a boolean criteria array created by TEXT(date_range,"MMMM")=month_criteria
Observation: Converting dates to month names enables matching against a text month label; SUMPRODUCT multiplies the TRUE/FALSE mask by the numeric values to aggregate matching rows
Problem: Return a blank instead of 0 when an aggregated result has no matching/nonzero contribution
Action: Wrap the aggregation in IF(test=0,"",test)
Observation: When no rows match (or all matching values sum to zero), the aggregation returns 0; testing for 0 allows suppressing the displayed result
